Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class InetAddressValidatorImpl

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectValidator<InetAddressValidator,InetAddress>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.InetAddressValidatorImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleObjectValidator<InetAddressValidator,InetAddress>, InetAddressValidator
public final class InetAddressValidatorImpl extends AbstractObjectValidator<InetAddressValidator,InetAddress> implements InetAddressValidator
Default implementation of InetAddressValidator.

  • Constructor Details

    • InetAddressValidatorImpl

      public InetAddressValidatorImpl(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, InetAddress actual, List<ValidationFailure> failures, boolean fatalFailure)
      Parameters:
      scope - the application configuration
      config - the instance configuration
      name - the name of the value
      actual - the actual value
      failures - the list of validation failures
      fatalFailure - true if validation stopped as the result of a fatal failure
      Throws:
      AssertionError - if scope, config, name or failures are null. If name is blank.
